question:
Why do people generally argue that true courage requires the presence of fear?
A) Fear gives humans superhuman physical strength.
B) If there is no fear or risk, an action requires no moral or physical fortitude to perform.
C) Courage is simply a biological mutation.
D) People who do not feel fear are legally classified as cowards.

B) If there is no fear or risk, an action requires no moral or physical fortitude to perform.
